message:
🐛 Fix Check Now spinner not animating on Developer channel (#1285)

forceCheck() for the developer channel called fetchAutoUpdateStatus()
or fetchLatestMainSHA() directly without setting isChecking=true,
so the RefreshCw spin animation never triggered.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
